extortion.description: [AI generated] AnnabelleCandy.com is a renowned online retailer of candy products based in Hayward, California. Named after its founder’s daughter, the company has been operating since 1950. The company is most popular for producing and selling iconic candy brands like Rocky Road, Big Hunk, LOOK, and Abba-Zaba. With decades of experience in the confectionery industry, AnnabelleCandy.com maintains its commitment to offering high-quality sweets with original taste and texture.
